# shouldUpdateWhileOffscreen

**Instance Property**

A Boolean that inidicates whether the web view should update even when it is not in a window that is currently visible.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var shouldUpdateWhileOffscreen: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

If [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true], the web view updates regardless if it is visible. If [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false], it updates only if it is visible, possibly improving performance, and then updates automatically when it becomes visible. The default value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true].

## Drawing

- **drawsBackground**: A Boolean that indicates whether the web view draws a background.
